requirements.task_name: Create a new discussion in 'Web Development' with specific title and tags and subscribe to it
requirements.task_description: Start a new discussion thread in the 'Web Development' category titled 'Best resources to learn responsive design?', add exactly the tags 'CSS' and 'Responsive Design', write a body of at least 3 sentences, and subscribe to receive notifications for that thread.
existing_variables: // to find the 'Web Development' category and its id/slug
// to verify title, categoryId, tagIds, isSubscribed, and that hasPoll is false
// to read the original post body and count sentences
// to resolve tagIds to tag names 'CSS' and 'Responsive Design'
// redundant but also links discussions to tags
// to know the current displayName if needed

requirements.task_name: Find a popular recent JavaScript array discussion and bookmark it
requirements.task_description: Search for discussions about JavaScript arrays, filter results to posts within the last 6 months that have at least 10 replies, sort by most upvoted, open the top result, upvote the original post, and bookmark the thread.
existing_variables: // to check replyCount, score, isBookmarked and that it matches JavaScript arrays topic
// to verify which post is the original post and its upvoteCount
// to see that an upvote reaction was recorded for the original post
// to confirm the discussion’s category if needed

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchDiscussions, after computing effectiveFilters and effectiveSort but before applying filters/sorting.
required_variables.value_to_set: { query: query, filters: effectiveFilters, sortBy: effectiveSort }
required_variables.reason: Tracks the exact search criteria (including query text, dateRange, minReplies, and sortBy) so the evaluator can verify that the user searched for 'JavaScript arrays' with dateRange 'last_6_months', minReplies >= 10, and sortBy 'most_upvoted'.

required_variables.set_condition: When called with bookmarked === true and the discussion is found (successful bookmarking).
required_variables.reason: Identifies which discussion the user explicitly bookmarked in this step so the evaluator can re-run searchDiscussions using task2_searchParams and confirm that this discussion was the top result and that its original post was upvoted.

requirements.task_name: Reply to two different users in the same thread and like multiple replies
requirements.task_description: In a single discussion thread, write replies to posts from two different users, tag one of them using an @mention, and like exactly 3 different replies from three unique users within that thread.
existing_variables: // to verify two replies with parentPostId pointing to different users, and to inspect @mentions in the body
// to check exactly three 'like' reactions and map them to reply posts
// to know the current user's displayName and exclude their own replies from the liked set

requirements.task_name: Follow three high-interest topics with at least 500 followers each
requirements.task_description: Use the forum’s topic or tag explorer to follow the topics 'UX Design', 'React', and 'Career Advice', choosing versions of these topics that each have at least 500 followers, and confirm you are following exactly three topics when finished.
existing_variables: // to inspect topic names, followerCount, and isFollowed state
// optional: to see discussions related to these tags if desired
// to connect discussions to followed topics if needed

requirements.task_name: Send a private message to a user whose answer has at least 5 upvotes
requirements.task_description: Find a discussion about portfolio reviews, locate a reply with 5 or more upvotes, open that author’s profile, and send them a private message with a specific subject and body text asking for feedback.
existing_variables: // to find discussions mentioning portfolios/portfolio reviews
// to locate replies with upvoteCount >= 5 and their authorProfileId
// to resolve authorProfileId to a profile
// to verify subject, body content, and recipientProfileId
// optional: to distinguish the current user from others

requirements.task_name: Update profile with new display name, bio, and timezone preferences
requirements.task_description: Go to your account settings and change your display name to 'Alex UX Researcher', add a bio of 20–30 words describing your role and interests, set your timezone to GMT+1, and enable daily summary notifications.
existing_variables: // stores displayName, bio, timezone, and dailySummaryEnabled

requirements.task_name: Report a spam reply in a discussion with 'spam' in the title
requirements.task_description: Search for a discussion with the word 'spam' in its title, find a reply containing a link and 0 upvotes, and submit a spam report for that specific reply using the forum’s reporting tools.
existing_variables: // to see submitted reports and their reasons/postId
// to check containsLink, links, and upvoteCount for the reported post
// to confirm that the associated discussion’s title includes 'spam'

requirements.task_name: Create a product feedback thread with a 3-option poll lasting 7 days
requirements.task_description: In the 'Product Feedback' category, create a new discussion that includes a poll with exactly 3 answer options, set the poll duration to 7 days, and disable multiple-choice voting so participants can choose only one option.
existing_variables: // to find the 'Product Feedback' category and its id/slug
// to verify title, categoryId, hasPoll, and body content
// to check question, multipleChoiceAllowed, startAt/endAt duration
// to confirm there are exactly 3 options with the specified labels
// to inspect the original post body text for minimum sentence count
